hooks.command: out=$(cargo fmt --check 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; echo '' >&2; echo "cargo fmt would modify files. Run 'cargo fmt', commit the changes, then retry the push." >&2; exit 2; }
out=$(cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; echo '' >&2; echo "cargo clippy failed. Fix the warnings, commit, then retry the push." >&2; exit 2; }
